name: actual write mode lands the composite YAML at <out-dir>/<target-namespace>/<framework-id>.yaml
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-o05-$$; mkdir -p $OUT && cat > $OUT/src.md <<'MD'
# Framework

## Rule one
prose one.
MD
cd $OUT && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --url $OUT/src.md --target-namespace european-union --framework-id o05 --source-id o05src --authoritative-publisher X --out-dir $OUT/out 2>e.err; [ -f $OUT/out/european-union/o05.yaml ] && grep -q 'WROTE' e.err && echo single-url-writes-target-namespace-framework-id-yaml 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
